creator: olli@fromme.com
text:
Bjoern Koenig wrote:
 > 	In preparation for the upcoming POV-Ray 3.7 release I clean up
 > 	the povray ports.
 > 
 > 	This update has the following major changes:
 > 	
 > 	- rename binary (and manpage) to avoid conflicts
 > 	- make X Window support optional
 > 	- remove dead mirror servers
 > 
 > 	With Oliver's accordance I would like to take maintainership
 > 	of this port to make the chain of command shorter in case of
 > 	further changes.

That's fine with me, go for it.  Thank you very much!

Best regards
   Oliver

``We are all but compressed light'' (Albert Einstein)
